title: harness cross-model review response
description: Reviewer adapter (claude or codex) must emit exactly this shape when sandbox=read-only. gate.sh parses approve to decide pass/fail and surfaces issues into the retry prompt on reject.

approve.description: true = diff is acceptable to merge; false = at least one blocking issue.

issues.description: Concrete problems with the diff. Empty when approve=true; required to be non-empty when approve=false.
